description: Compare the Global Warming Potential (GWP) of two flooring options using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip). Model 'Flooring, Local Ceramic' with 20 kg material input and 200 km truck transport (in ton*km). Model 'Flooring, Global Vinyl' with 3 kg material input, 15,000 km ocean freight (in ton*km), and 1,000 km truck transport (in ton*km). Calculate the LCIA for both product systems using the TRACI 2.1 method and export the comparison results to ~/LCA_Results/flooring_comparison.csv.
